title: On load, Plan List mode shows multi-day itinerary sections with at least 8 seeded stops and place names visible
After creating a stop named 'Harbor Lookout' on a day with valid required fields, the text 'Harbor Lookout' is visible in the plan list
After adding 3 new stops on top of the seed set, the plan list shows exactly 3 more stops than the initial seeded count
After selecting a stop, the place detail overlay or panel shows that stop's name and tab chrome (About or equivalent)
After editing a stop name to 'Evening Promenade', the text 'Evening Promenade' is visible and the previous name is not
After deleting a stop, that stop name is no longer visible in the plan list
After deleting all stops, an empty state is visible in the plan list region
After submitting create with an empty required stop name, the stops count does not increase and validation feedback is visible
After filtering or focusing a single day (with multi-day stops present), only that day's stops remain emphasized or visible in the filtered list
After switching emphasis between Plan List and Map modes (or Trip plan / map focus), the workspace shows the other mode without full page navigation
After switching place detail tabs (About / Reviews or equivalent), the panel content swaps without leaving the page
When hovering place rows, sidebar items, or map chrome controls, a visible hover lift, wash, or press feedback appears
